subject: Hendricks: Calacatta Viola marble - update from Aria Stone Gallery
snippet: Hi Tom,
body:
Hi Tom,

Quick update on the Calacatta Viola marble for the master bath. Aria Stone Gallery confirmed the slab is on schedule; delivery lands the week of the 20th. I will forward the packing dimensions to Carlos so the team is ready for install.

Best,
Jessica

subject: Hendricks: powder room finish samples - Restoration Hardware pull request
snippet: Hi Rebecca,
body:
Hi Rebecca,

I have the RH trade order queued for the powder room pulls. I would like to lock in your finish preference before Friday so we do not lose the current lead time. Photos of the two contenders are in the Drive folder.

Best,
Jessica

subject: Martin Condo: kitchen budget snapshot before we lock the appliance package
snippet: Hi Sarah,
body:
Hi Sarah,

Sharing the running budget for the Martin condo kitchen. We are at $42K of the $85K committed. Locking the Wolf/Sub-Zero package this week keeps the June completion realistic. Say the word and I will place the order.

Best,
Jessica

subject: Desert Vista: staging install kickoff for the three model homes - Oct 24
snippet: Hi Brian,
body:
Hi Brian,

Confirming the install kickoff for Desert Vista on the 24th. Natalie will lead the walkthrough at 9 AM; Sophie is handling the sample staging in Model B and C. Please have the site manager clear the shell of last-minute punch items before we roll in.

Best,
Jessica

subject: Studio: this week's client presentations and site walkthroughs
snippet: Hi Natalie,
body:
Hi Natalie,

Week ahead - Tuesday is the Martin condo presentation at the studio, Thursday is the Hendricks walkthrough at 10 AM. Please pull the updated moodboards into the Notion space by Monday evening.

Jessica

subject: Sourcing: Holly Hunt vs Restoration Hardware trade comparison for Martin living room
snippet: Hi Sophie,
body:
Hi Sophie,

Can you get me the side-by-side trade pricing on the Holly Hunt sectional vs the RH equivalent by Wednesday? I want to have both in front of Sarah at the Tuesday walkthrough.

Jessica

subject: Spencer Interiors: monthly vendor invoice review (15th)
snippet: Hi Janet,
body:
Hi Janet,

Invoice review packet for the 15th is in Drive - vendor totals came in slightly under budget this cycle. Please cut the Aria Stone deposit and the Carlos progress payment first.

Best,
Jessica

subject: Hendricks master bath: install sequence for Calacatta Viola
snippet: Hi Carlos,
body:
Hi Carlos,

Calacatta Viola arrives the week of the 20th. Please coordinate the drill-and-set sequence with the tile crew so we do not stack labor. Aim for install starting the 22nd.

Jessica

subject: DC Ranch spec: final staging window Dec 5, listing photos to follow
snippet: Kevin,
body:
Kevin,

Blocking Dec 5 for the final staging on the DC Ranch spec so your listing photos can shoot the following week. Sophie has the sample list; I will keep the total under $45K per what we discussed.

Jessica

subject: Thanksgiving at Grayhawk - flight timing and room refresh
snippet: Hi Mom,
body:
Hi Mom,

We are all set for Thanksgiving. Emma and Tyler are already excited. I refreshed the guest room and the pantry. Just send me your flight and I will handle the airport run. Love you.

Jessica

body: Delivery confirmed for Monday between 10 AM and noon. Order details attached. Thank you for shopping with Green Harvest Market.

snippet: Hi Jessica,
body:

Please send over the Q3 2026 revenue snapshot and expense summary at your earliest convenience so we can finalize the estimated payment. The Chase business checking export is fine.

Best regards,
Reynolds and Associates

subject: Trade: Calacatta Viola slab confirmation - Hendricks residence
snippet: Jessica,
body:
Jessica,

Slab confirmed for the Hendricks project - Calacatta Viola, book-matched. Anticipated crating and shipping next week. Certificate of origin will be included.

Best,
Aria Stone Trade

Thank you for your continued membership.

ASID Member Services
